nodes.name: WhatsApp Trigger
nodes.notes: Entry point. Receives all WhatsApp webhook events: messages, status updates, delivery receipts.

nodes.name: Skip If Invalid
nodes.notes: TRUE (skip) → stop. FALSE → continue to security check.

nodes.name: Verify Webhook Signature
nodes.notes: NEW (Tier 2): Validates X-Hub-Signature-256 header to block forged webhook requests. Requires WHATSAPP_APP_SECRET env var.

nodes.name: Read Receipt + Typing
nodes.notes: NEW (Tier 2): Marks message as read (double blue tick) and sends typing indicator. Errors are non-fatal.

nodes.name: User Onboarding
nodes.notes: FIX v4: Checks Supabase (not just static data) to detect new users — survives restarts.

nodes.name: Voice Transcription
nodes.notes: NEW (Tier 3): Transcribes WhatsApp voice messages using OpenAI Whisper. Requires OPENAI_API_KEY. Gracefully skipped if key not set.

nodes.name: Image Analysis
nodes.notes: NEW (Tier 3): Downloads WhatsApp image and sends to Gemini Vision for analysis. Falls back gracefully on failure.

parameters.jsonBody: ={"messaging_product":"whatsapp","to":"{{$json.user_id}}","type":"text","text":{"body":"⏳ أرسلت رسائل كثيرة. انتظر دقيقة واحدة ثم حاول مجدداً."}}

nodes.name: Load Conversation History
nodes.notes: NEW (Tier 2): Loads per-user history from Redis (with static data fallback). Redis requires REDIS_URL + REDIS_TOKEN (Upstash).

nodes.name: Parse Intent
nodes.notes: FIX v4: Now correctly forwards ALL upstream fields (tenant_id, phone_number, memoryContext, userProfile) to prevent data loss.

nodes.name: Prepare Gemini Request
nodes.notes: v5: يستخدم businessPersona (BOT_PERSONA + معلومات العمل من Supabase)

nodes.name: Send WhatsApp Message
nodes.notes: FIX v4: Correct phone extraction from user_id. Tracks send results per message.

parameters.jsonBody: ={"messaging_product":"whatsapp","to":"{{$json.user_id}}","type":"text","text":{"body":"عذراً، حدث خطأ أثناء معالجة رسالتك. يرجى المحاولة مجدداً بعد لحظات. 🙏"}}

nodes.name: Telegram Error Alert
nodes.notes: NEW (Tier 2): Sends admin alert to Telegram on any workflow error. Requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN + TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID.

nodes.name: Log to Supabase
nodes.notes: NEW (Tier 2): Logs every interaction to Supabase (conversations + users + tasks tables). Gracefully skipped if SUPABASE_URL/KEY not set.

nodes.name: Admin Command Detector
nodes.notes: v5: يكتشف أوامر /admin لإدارة معلومات العمل مباشرة من واتساب. يتطلب ADMIN_PASSWORD و ADMIN_PHONE

nodes.name: Skip If Admin Command
nodes.notes: TRUE → أمر admin تمت معالجته، توقف. FALSE → مستخدم عادي، تابع.

nodes.name: Load Business Knowledge
nodes.notes: v5: يجلب معلومات العمل من جدول business_knowledge في Supabase ويدمجها مع BOT_PERSONA

nodes.name: Human Review Check
nodes.notes: يفحص هل الرد يحتاج مراجعة بشرية

nodes.name: Needs Human Review?
nodes.notes: true = يحتاج مراجعة | false = أرسل مباشرة

nodes.name: Send Review Request
nodes.notes: يرسل طلب المراجعة على Telegram ورسالة انتظار للمستخدم

nodes.name: Log Pending Review
nodes.notes: يحفظ المحادثة بحالة pending_review في Supabase
